scenes.title: Benny’s Morning
scenes.text: Benny the little rabbit wakes up under the old oak tree. A silver bell rings across the forest. On his door he finds a note: “The Forest Crystal is missing.” Benny takes a deep breath. This is his chance to be brave.

choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Ask Grandma Rabbit for help
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Head into the whispering forest
choice_labels.Key: 🗝️ Key — Open the little wooden box

scenes.title: Grandma’s Advice
scenes.text: Grandma Rabbit says, “Bravery does not mean you are never afraid. It means you help even when your paws shake.” She gives Benny an old map.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Take the forest path
choice_labels.Shield: 🛡️ Shield — Ask for a leaf shield

scenes.title: The Little Wooden Box
scenes.text: Benny finds a little wooden box near his bed. It has a golden lock shaped like a star.

choice_labels.Key: 🗝️ Key — Try to open the golden lock
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Leave for the forest

scenes.title: The Hidden Golden Key
scenes.text: The key opens the box. Inside, Benny finds a Golden Key and a note: “This opens what fear keeps closed.”

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Follow the forest path

scenes.title: The Leaf Shield
scenes.text: Grandma gives Benny a strong shield made from a giant moonleaf. It shines whenever danger is near.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Enter the forest with the shield

scenes.title: The Whispering Forest
scenes.text: Benny enters the forest. Glowing butterflies guide the path. Suddenly, he hears a squirrel crying for help from a thorn bush.

scenes.title: Sammy the Squirrel
scenes.text: Benny gently speaks to the squirrel. Sammy smiles and gives Benny a red apple. “A hungry friend may need this later,” he says.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Continue to the broken bridge
choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Ask the Wise Tree for guidance

scenes.title: Careful Paws
scenes.text: Benny uses a small wooden practice sword to move the thorns away without hurting the bush. Sammy is free and gives Benny a Feather Charm.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Head to the broken bridge
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Chat with Sammy the squirrel

scenes.title: A Quiet Mistake
scenes.text: Benny hides behind a mushroom. The forest grows colder. He continues, but he feels that bravery also means stopping to help.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Keep walking to the bridge
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Go back and help the squirrel

scenes.title: The Wise Tree
scenes.text: The oldest tree in the forest opens one sleepy eye. “The crystal was taken to the mountain tower,” it says. “Every path asks for kindness first.”

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Follow the path to the bridge
choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Listen to the mushroom circle

scenes.title: The Mushroom Circle
scenes.text: A circle of blue mushrooms hums a gentle song. Benny sees a vision: a lonely fox carrying the crystal, not to steal it, but to save his sick sister.

choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Meet Fina the fox kindly
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Hurry to the broken bridge

scenes.title: The Broken Bridge
scenes.text: Benny reaches a broken bridge over a fast river. The other side leads to the mountain tower.

choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Call on Tilly the turtle
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Walk along the riverbank

scenes.title: Across the Bridge
scenes.text: Benny holds the Leaf Shield above his head. The shield catches the wind and helps him cross safely.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Find Fina the fox

scenes.title: Tilly the Turtle
scenes.text: A wise turtle rises from the river. “Small feet can still make great journeys,” she says, carrying Benny across.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Meet Fina the fox

scenes.title: The Long Riverbank
scenes.text: Benny follows the riverbank. It is longer and darker, but he finds fox footprints in the mud.

choice_labels.Hide: 🙈 Hide — Watch the fox from the shadows

scenes.title: The River Song
scenes.text: Benny listens to the river and learns its rhythm. The River Stone glows, and Benny understands the forest’s warnings.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Follow the fox to the tower

scenes.title: The Fox’s Shadow
scenes.text: Benny hides quietly and sees a fox clutching the Forest Crystal. The fox looks scared, not evil.

choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Speak to the fox with kindness

scenes.title: The Wrong Kind of Brave
scenes.text: Benny waves the practice sword. The fox runs away in fear. Benny realizes frightening someone is not the same as solving the problem.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Climb to the mountain tower
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Apologize and talk to Fina

scenes.title: Fina the Fox
scenes.text: Benny approaches the fox kindly. Fina says her little sister is sick. Benny understands: the forest needs the crystal, but Fina needs help too.

choice_labels.Key: 🗝️ Key — Use the key at the tower
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Make a promise about the crystal

scenes.title: The Apple Gift
scenes.text: Benny gives Fina the apple. Her little sister smiles for the first time all day. Fina says, “I will return the crystal with you.”

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Climb to the mountain tower
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Promise to help Fina together

scenes.title: A Promise Under the Stars
scenes.text: Benny promises Fina they will ask the Wise Tree how to heal her sister without stealing the crystal. The crystal glows brighter.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Walk to the mountain tower
choice_labels.Open Door: 🚪 Open Door — Try the tower gate

scenes.title: The Mountain Tower
scenes.text: At the top of the hill stands an old tower covered in vines. The crystal’s light shines through a locked door.

choice_labels.Open Door: 🚪 Open Door — Push the tower door
choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Ask the vines for help
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Head back toward the broken bridge

scenes.title: The Door Will Not Open
scenes.text: Benny pushes the tower door, but it will not move. A golden keyhole blinks like a sleepy star.

choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Ask the vines to lift you up
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Step back and try another way

scenes.title: The Helpful Vines
scenes.text: Benny asks the vines for help. Because he listened to the forest, the vines lift him to a round window.

choice_labels.Open Door: 🚪 Open Door — Climb in through the window
choice_labels.Key: 🗝️ Key — Try the golden door instead

scenes.title: The Golden Door
scenes.text: The Golden Key turns softly. The tower door opens with a little song.

choice_labels.Open Door: 🚪 Open Door — Enter the crystal room
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Call out to the crystal

scenes.title: The Crystal Room
scenes.text: The Forest Crystal is safe, but its light is weak. It needs one final act: Benny must decide what kind of hero he wants to be.

choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Return the crystal with kindness
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Return the crystal and talk
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Run home before deciding

scenes.title: Golden Ending
scenes.text: Benny returns the crystal and helps Fina’s sister. The forest heals, the river sings, and every animal celebrates Benny because he was kind and brave.

scenes.title: Silver Ending
scenes.text: Benny returns the crystal. The stars shine again, and the animals are safe. Fina watches from far away, hoping someone will help her too.

scenes.title: Soft Ending
scenes.text: Benny runs before understanding the crystal’s lesson. He finds his way home by sunrise and knows he must try again with a kinder heart.
